content:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3dFOw6JrsZ0
I really enjoyed Morimens and made a commentary. This is my first time making a commentary and it took me a lot longer than I'd expected. But I really enjoy the process and I hope others can enjoy watching this<:Horla_shy:1468259514091573350>

embeds.title: Morimens Prologue Commentary
embeds.description:
This is my first time making a commentary for a game I enjoy. I hope I can make a series in the future.

Track: The First Silver Key (OST.01)
Game: Morimens
Developer: B.I.A.V. Studio
Additional Soundtracks: Morimens, Ex Oblivione, Rain Falls, and To be Continued
